name: Oracle Fusion Cloud ERP API
what_it_does: Oracle Fusion Cloud ERP REST API for enterprise financial management, procurement, project management, and supply chain operations. Enables AI agents to manage general ledger, subledger accounting, and financial close for enterprise accounting automation, handle procurement and supplier management for enterprise procure-to-pay automation, access project cost management and labor billing for professional services and project accounting, retrieve financial consolidation and intercompany elimination for enterprise reporting, manage accounts payable and expense management for enterprise AP automation, handle revenue management and ASC 606 compliance for subscription and project revenue recognition, access supply chain planning and inventory management for enterprise supply chain automation, retrieve HCM payroll and compensation data for enterprise HR operations, manage financial analytics and EPM integration for enterprise business intelligence, and integrate Oracle Fusion with Oracle Analytics, SCM, and third-party enterprise platforms.
use_cases: Automating financial close from accounting agents
Processing procurement from P2P automation agents
Managing project billing from professional services agents
Consolidating financials from enterprise reporting agents
not_for: Small and mid-market companies (use NetSuite or Sage Intacct)
Single-entity businesses without complex financial structures
Non-enterprise companies without Oracle implementation resources
best_when: A large enterprise, Fortune 500 company, government agency, or multinational corporation wanting AI agents to automate enterprise financial close, procurement workflow, project accounting, supply chain operations, and regulatory financial reporting.
avoid_when: SOX AND INTERNAL AUDIT CONTROL ENVIRONMENT: Automated financial transaction creation and approval in Oracle Fusion must maintain SOX segregation of duties and internal control framework; automated agent with both create and approve access to journal entries violates SOX control design; implement role-based access with human approval gates. IFRS and GAAP reporting accuracy — automated financial reporting from Oracle Fusion must apply correct accounting standards (IFRS vs US GAAP) for each legal entity; automated consolidation with incorrect accounting standard application creates financial statement misstatement. Government Funds Accounting — Oracle Fusion public sector use for government fund accounting must maintain fund balance and appropriation integrity; automated budget transfers without statutory authority create government accountability and Anti-Deficiency Act exposure. Oracle REST API versioning — Oracle Fusion REST APIs are versioned; automated integrations must pin to specific version and test before version upgrades; Oracle Fusion quarterly updates can introduce breaking changes in unpinned integrations.

auth.notes: Oracle Fusion Cloud uses OAuth 2.0 with IDCS (Identity Domain Cloud Service). REST API with JSON. Austin, Texas HQ (Oracle Corp, NYSE: ORCL). Founded 1977. Public. Oracle $55B+ annual revenue. Oracle Fusion Cloud ERP launched 2011. Enterprise ERP for large corporations and government. 9,000+ Oracle Fusion Cloud ERP customers. Quarterly update cadence. Competes with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Workday Financials, and Microsoft Dynamics 365 for enterprise ERP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user enterprise annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; Financials, Procurement, Project, SCM modules priced separately
pricing.notes: Austin TX. Oracle NYSE:ORCL. $55B+ revenue. Founded 1977. Fusion Cloud ERP 2011. 9,000+ enterprise customers. Module-based enterprise licensing.

performance.rate_limits: Concurrent REST API request limits per service; documented in Oracle Cloud Infrastructure documentation

known_agent_gotchas: QUARTERLY UPDATE BREAKING CHANGES: Oracle Fusion Cloud receives mandatory quarterly updates; automated integrations using unpinned REST API versions may break silently after quarterly update; pin REST API version explicitly and implement automated regression testing before each quarterly update deployment

SOX SEGREGATION OF DUTIES IN AUTOMATED WORKFLOWS: Oracle Fusion automated agent service accounts must have strictly scoped roles; service account with create-and-approve Journal Entry access violates SOX control design; implement human approval workflow for all material financial transactions

IDCS OAuth token lifecycle — Oracle IDCS OAuth tokens have configurable expiration (default 1 hour); long-running automated financial processing workflows must implement token refresh before expiration; token expiration during batch processing creates partial-completion financial data states

Subledger accounting rules — automated subledger journal entry creation must apply correct account derivation rules; incorrect subledger accounting rule mapping creates GL balance reconciliation issues that require manual correction

Procurement approval hierarchy — automated purchase requisition and PO creation must respect Oracle Fusion approval hierarchy configuration; bypassing approval hierarchy in automated procurement creates internal control violation and audit finding

Multi-language and multi-currency rounding — Oracle Fusion multi-currency transaction automation must apply correct functional currency rounding; automated currency conversion without Oracle's configured rounding rules creates financial reporting differences
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise ERP. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP, GDPR, PCI-DSS. OAuth2 with IDCS. US/EU/APAC/Global. Enterprise financial and procurement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise ERP. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP, GDPR. OAuth2 with IDCS. US/EU/Global. Enterprise financial data.
